name: Chocolate Hippenmasse
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, almond paste, flour, cocoa powder, and cinnamon in a food processor until the mixture has a grainy consistency.
2. In a separate bowl, combine egg white with milk and cream.
3. Add the egg white mixture to the food processor while it is still running.
4. Remove the batter and let it rest for one hour.
5. Spread a thin, even layer of dough on a cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F until the dough has a glossy look.
7. Remove from oven and cut into desired shape.
Each portion contains: kcal 9, protein trace, fat trace, carbs 1 gm, sodium trace, cholesterol trace (from Roy Waters (TSSF43F), Chef Roy).
